title: GenBank Accession Numbers of A revision of the higher latitude periwinkle species Laevilitorina caliginosa sensu lato
author: Rosenfeld, Sebastián
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains GenBank accession numbers for 45 cytochrome c oxidase subunit I (cox1) and  32 large subunit ribosomal RNA (28S rRNA) genes obtained originally from  Laevilitorina caliginosa, Laevilacunaria antarctica, Laevilitorina umbilicata and Laevilitorina claviformis.  The original specimen voucher is also included.
steps_raw: This dataset contains GenBank accession numbers for 45 cytochrome c oxidase subunit I (cox1) and  32 large subunit ribosomal RNA (28S rRNA) genes obtained originally from  Laevilitorina caliginosa, Laevilacunaria antarctica, Laevilitorina umbilicata and Laevilitorina claviformis.  The original specimen voucher is also included.
